$schema.description: Schema reference for this config file

sandbox.description: Sandbox isolation mode. 'none' runs commands directly; 'docker' wraps bash commands in Docker containers.

dockerImage.description: Docker image to use for sandbox. Auto-detected from project files if omitted (e.g., node:22-slim for Node.js projects).

persistentContainers.description: Reuse Docker containers per worktree (docker exec) instead of creating new ones per command (docker run --rm). Default: true when sandbox is 'docker'.

executionMode.description: Worker dispatch strategy. 'parallel' (default) spawns all worker agents concurrently; 'sequential' runs one worker at a time to reduce VRAM/resource usage. Read once at dispatch time by hive_worktree_batch.

enableToolsFor.description: Enable hive tools for specific features

disableSkills.description: Globally disable specific skills (e.g., ['brainstorming', 'writing-plans']). Disabled skills won't appear in hive_skill tool.

disableMcps.description: Globally disable specific MCP servers (e.g., ['websearch', 'ast_grep']). Available: websearch, context7, grep_app, ast_grep

agentMode.description: Agent specialization mode. 'unified' (default) uses a single hybrid agent for all roles; 'dedicated' uses specialized agents for each role.

hook_cadence.description: Hook execution cadence configuration. Key = hook name, Value = number of turns between invocations (1 = every turn, 3 = every 3rd turn). All hooks default to 1.

additionalProperties.description: Number of turns between hook invocations

enabled.description: Enable automatic context compression when threshold is reached

threshold.description: Context usage threshold to trigger compression (0.5 = 50% of context limit)

maxToolCalls.description: Maximum number of tool calls to keep after compression

protectedTools.description: Tool names to protect from compression (glob patterns supported)

protectUserMessages.description: Protect user messages from being compressed

enabled.description: Enable automatic session summarization and memory persistence

autoSummarize.description: Automatically summarize conversation after N messages

summarizeAfterMessages.description: Number of messages after which to trigger summarization

useOpencodeDb.description: Store memories in OpenCode database path for cross-session persistence

mcpApiKeys.description: MCP API keys configuration (also supports environment variables: EXA_API_KEY, CONTEXT7_API_KEY)

exa.description: Exa API key for websearch (optional - works without it)

context7.description: Context7 API key (optional - works without it)

customAgents.description: Custom Hive subagent definitions derived from forager-worker or hygienic-reviewer. IDs cannot reuse built-in or plugin-reserved names.

autoLoadSkills.description: Skills to auto-load for this agent

variant.description: Variant key for model reasoning/effort level (e.g., 'low', 'medium', 'high', 'max'). Must match a key in opencode.json provider.<provider>.models.<model>.variants

customPrompt.description: Additional prompt content injected into the agent's system prompt. Useful for giving a subagent a specific role or instructions.

baseAgent.description: Built-in Hive agent to inherit prompt/tools/permissions from

description.description: Human-facing description injected into delegation guidance

variant.description: Variant override for model reasoning/effort level

autoLoadSkills.description: Additional skills to auto-load for this custom agent (merged with inherited base autoLoadSkills and filtered by disableSkills)

customPrompt.description: Additional prompt content injected into the agent's system prompt. Useful for giving a custom subagent a specific role or instructions.
